personal.name: Rohit Kumar
personal.role: UI Lead | Senior Full Stack Engineer (Angular & .NET)

summary: UI Lead | Senior Full Stack Engineer (Angular & .NET) with 8+ years of experience building scalable enterprise web applications using Angular (v12–18+), TypeScript, JavaScript, and RxJS. Expert in frontend architecture, UI performance optimization, and full-stack development across Angular and .NET Core ecosystems with strong REST API design and integration expertise. Led migration of 15+ enterprise applications to an Nx Monorepo with Micro-Frontend architecture, improving performance by up to 40% while maintaining 85%+ test coverage. Proven engineering leader who has mentored 30+ developers, led architecture reviews, and established coding standards within Agile/Scrum teams.

experiences.title: UI Lead
highlights: Improved application performance by ~40% across enterprise Angular apps by implementing Angular Signals, zoneless change detection, OnPush strategies, and lazy loading — directly improving Core Web Vitals and UI responsiveness.
Modernized legacy Angular modules to Standalone Components and Signals-based state management, reducing complexity and accelerating feature delivery cycles.
Owned full-stack feature delivery using .NET Core Web APIs, applying Specification Pattern and claims-based authorization to unblock frontend progress without backend dependency.
Maintained 85%+ automated test coverage (Jest + Playwright), reducing regression risk and improving release confidence across enterprise-critical modules.
Established shared Angular libraries and architecture standards adopted across multiple enterprise products, scaling engineering consistency across teams.
Mentored frontend engineers through architecture reviews and coaching on Angular, RxJS, and performance engineering best practices.

experiences.title: Senior UI Developer
experiences.company: Dreamorbit Softech Pvt Ltd (Acquired by Saksoft)
experiences.summary: Led full platform modernization from legacy ASP.NET monolith to Angular + .NET Core, architecting the engineering foundation for 15+ enterprise applications serving 10,000+ users.
highlights: Delivered a full platform modernization in 1 year — migrating a legacy ASP.NET monolith to Angular (v12+) + .NET Core, establishing the engineering foundation for all subsequent enterprise products.
Designed the Angular + DevExtreme + OData architecture standard adopted across multiple teams, powering 15+ enterprise applications serving 10,000+ users in compliance and financial domains.
Led the migration of 15+ Angular apps into an Nx Monorepo with Webpack Module Federation Micro Frontend architecture, improving scalability, maintainability, and independent deployment.
Built high-performance, data-intensive UI modules — enterprise grids, dashboards, and analytics visualizations — for large-scale datasets using DevExtreme, Angular Material, RxJS, and OData APIs.
Designed a centralized permission system enabling secure, consistent access control across all micro frontend modules.
Mentored 30+ developers on Angular architecture and micro-frontend design; drove team-wide code review standards and engineering best practices.

experiences.title: Senior Software Engineer
experiences.summary: Engineered core modules for a Mutual Fund and Share Market platform processing $10M+ daily transactions, delivering high-performance dashboards and workflows for 5,000+ financial advisors.
highlights: Engineered core modules for Mutual Fund and Share Market platform processing $10M+ daily transactions, utilizing Angular 10, Java Spring Boot, and REST APIs.
Built intuitive dashboards with 15+ interactive charts and data visualizations using Chart.js and D3.js, improving user engagement by 60%.
Created a user onboarding workflow reducing new user setup time by 50% through streamlined multi-step forms and validation.
Led module-level development for portfolio management features used by 5,000+ financial advisors and investors.
Collaborated with backend team to optimize API performance, reducing average response time from 800ms to 250ms.
Mentored junior engineers on Angular fundamentals, coding standards, and best practices — contributing to a 40% improvement in code review pass rate.

experiences.title: Software Engineer
experiences.summary: Started as a UI Developer and self-initiated Angular learning — becoming sole developer within 6 months, leading a full AngularJS-to-Angular migration, PWA implementation, and a real-time IoT monitoring dashboard for industrial equipment.
highlights: Joined as a UI Developer building interfaces in HTML/CSS, then self-initiated learning of AngularJS — becoming the sole developer responsible for maintaining and evolving the application within 6 months.
Led the full migration of the AngularJS application to Angular 2+, introducing Angular Material as the UI framework and modernizing the codebase architecture.
Implemented Progressive Web App (PWA) capabilities for the platform, followed by an Angular-based native app — extending the product's reach across web and mobile.

Designed and built a real-time IoT monitoring dashboard for industrial rice mill and solar plant equipment, streaming live data from 50+ devices using Angular 8, Socket.IO, Chart.js, and Node.js — displaying power usage, machine health, and temperature metrics.

experiences.title: Web Developer Intern
experiences.summary: Delivered 10+ responsive websites and contributed to UI/UX enhancements and SEO optimization for client projects.
highlights: Delivered 10+ responsive websites using HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and WordPress, improving mobile accessibility by 70%.
Contributed to UI/UX enhancements and SEO optimization, increasing organic traffic by 45% for client websites.
Implemented custom WordPress themes and plugins based on project requirements, reducing development time by 30%.
Utilized responsive design principles and cross-browser compatibility testing to ensure consistent user experience across devices.
